mapper.select:
SELECT YEAR, MORG_CODE, MORG_NAME, ERP_ASSET_TYPE, ERP_ASSET_TYPE_NAME, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_ADJ, PURCHASE_Q1_TOTAL_BUDGET, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_ADJ, PURCHASE_Q2_TOTAL_BUDGET, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_ADJ, PURCHASE_Q3_TOTAL_BUDGET, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_ADJ, PURCHASE_Q4_TOTAL_BUDGET, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q1_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q2_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q3_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q4_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY YEAR DESC, MORG_CODE, ERP_ASSET_TYPE) AS rn, YEAR, MORG_CODE, MORG_NAME, ERP_ASSET_TYPE, ERP_ASSET_TYPE_NAME, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_ADJ, PURCHASE_Q1_TOTAL_BUDGET, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_ADJ, PURCHASE_Q2_TOTAL_BUDGET, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_ADJ, PURCHASE_Q3_TOTAL_BUDGET, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_ADJ, PURCHASE_Q4_TOTAL_BUDGET, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q1_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q2_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q3_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q4_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE FROM V_BUDGET_QUARTERLY_AGGREGATE_BY_MORG
) t WHERE t.rn BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT YEAR, MORG_CODE, MORG_NAME, ERP_ASSET_TYPE, ERP_ASSET_TYPE_NAME, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_ADJ, PURCHASE_Q1_TOTAL_BUDGET, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_ADJ, PURCHASE_Q2_TOTAL_BUDGET, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_ADJ, PURCHASE_Q3_TOTAL_BUDGET, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_ADJ, PURCHASE_Q4_TOTAL_BUDGET, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q1_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q2_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q3_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q4_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE FROM V_BUDGET_QUARTERLY_AGGREGATE_BY_MORG
ORDER BY YEAR DESC, MORG_CODE, ERP_ASSET_TYPE

SELECT YEAR, MORG_CODE, MORG_NAME, ERP_ASSET_TYPE, ERP_ASSET_TYPE_NAME, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_ADJ, PURCHASE_Q1_TOTAL_BUDGET, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PURCHASE_Q1_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_ADJ, PURCHASE_Q2_TOTAL_BUDGET, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PURCHASE_Q2_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_ADJ, PURCHASE_Q3_TOTAL_BUDGET, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PURCHASE_Q3_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_ADJ, PURCHASE_Q4_TOTAL_BUDGET, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PURCHASE_Q4_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q1_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q2_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q3_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q4_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE FROM V_BUDGET_QUARTERLY_AGGREGATE_BY_MORG
ORDER BY YEAR DESC, MORG_CODE, ERP_ASSET_TYPE
